home.title: Welcome to
home.description: İleri Group Insurance is one of Turkey's leading insurance brokers, offering comprehensive insurance solutions to both corporate clients and individuals with over 30 years of experience.
home.intro: Whatever your insurance needs – from health insurance to motor and traffic insurance, from home insurance to liability policies – İleri Group Insurance is by your side. We combine our wide range of products with the deep expertise of our expert team to protect your risks.
home.quote: "Reliable, innovative, professional" – with this approach, we develop digital solutions that make our customers' lives easier. For example, our revolutionary Complication Insurance product for health tourism supports international patients and healthcare institutions.
home.experienceDesc: Our long-standing experience enables us to provide the right solutions for every type of insurance need.
home.expertsDesc: Our team includes experts from various sectors including insurance, healthcare, engineering, and logistics.
home.productsDesc: We offer over 50 different insurance products in our portfolio for both individual and corporate clients.
home.digitalDesc: We simplify your transactions with digital services such as online quotes, instant policy issuance, claims tracking, and customer portal.
home.supportDesc: Our customers can reach us whenever they need. We're by your side from claim reporting to compensation payment.
home.customerFocusDesc: Every customer is special to us. We create customized solutions and establish long-term business partnerships.
home.ctaIntro: At İleri Group Insurance, our goal is to protect you against risks while making your insurance experience easy and enjoyable.
home.cta: Come and experience the İleri Group Insurance guarantee;

about.title: About Us
about.historyDesc: İleri Grup Sigorta Aracılık Hizmetleri Ltd. Şti. is a well-established and respected insurance agency founded in Istanbul in 1995. Since our foundation, we have set an example in our sector with our customer-oriented and reliable service approach.
about.mission: Our mission is "to be by our customers' side in all conditions and to provide them with access to the most suitable insurance solutions."
about.missionExtra: With this mission, we analyze our customers' needs accurately and offer the most suitable coverage from our wide product range.
about.visionDesc: Our vision is to be the first address that comes to mind when insurance is mentioned in Turkey, thanks to our innovative solutions and expert staff.
about.visionHighlight: "İleri Group – The Address of Assurance in Health Tourism"
about.reliabilityDesc: Honesty and transparency are the basis of our relationships. We keep our promises to our customers and make maximum effort not to shake their trust.
about.expertiseDesc: We continuously invest in our staff. Our team includes insurance experts with over 30 years of experience.
about.innovationDesc: We closely follow technology and integrate it into our services. Our online complication insurance platform is an example of this.
about.satisfactionDesc: Above all, we prioritize customer satisfaction. Ensuring that you are satisfied with every service you receive from us is our top priority.
about.socialDesc: As İleri Grup Sigorta, we are obliged not only to commercial activities but also to contribute to the society we are in.
about.teamDesc: The strength of İleri Grup Sigorta comes from its qualified human resources. We have insurance brokers, technical experts, and actuarial consultants within our organization.
about.teamExtra: We have a separate expert team specifically for health tourism and complication insurance.
about.teamQuote: We offer our customers a versatile experience by combining our insurance accumulation with the possibilities of the digital world.
about.resultsDesc: Since our foundation, we have signed countless success stories.
about.partnerQuote: Customers working with us know that they are not just buying insurance; they also have a risk management partner.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Getting in touch with us is very easy! We would be happy to help you with your insurance needs, policies, or any questions you may have.
contact.socialDesc: You can also follow İleri Grup Sigorta from our social media accounts.
contact.formDesc: You can send us a direct message by filling out the form below. After submitting your request, our team will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.footerNote: When you contact us, our friendly and expert team will help you in the best way. As İleri Grup Sigorta, we are here to listen to you and produce solutions for your needs.

individual.title: Individual Insurance
individual.description: Customized insurance solutions designed to protect the future, quality of life, and assets of you and your loved ones.

health.title: Private Health Insurance
health.desc: We secure the health of you and your family in Turkey's best hospitals.

car.title: Motor & Traffic
car.desc: We protect your vehicle against accidents, theft, and natural disasters with wide coverage.

home.title: Home Insurance
home.desc: We insure your home and belongings against all kinds of risks, from fire to flooding.

travel.title: Travel Health
travel.desc: We're by your side against unexpected health problems during your domestic and international travels.

complementary.title: Complementary Health
complementary.desc: We enable you to receive treatment at SSI-contracted private hospitals without paying difference fees.

dask.title: DASK
dask.desc: Protect your home against earthquake and earthquake-related risks with compulsory earthquake insurance.

individual.ctaTitle: Let's Determine the Best Policy for You Together
individual.ctaDesc: Our expert consultants analyze the coverage you need and offer the most affordable options.

corporate.title: Corporate Insurance
corporate.description: We analyze your business risks and offer professional solutions to ensure your activities continue uninterrupted.

workplace.title: Workplace Insurance
workplace.desc: Protect your office, shop, or factory against all risks with a single policy.

transport.title: Transport & Logistics
transport.desc: We protect your cargo against damages that may occur during sea, air, or land transportation.

cyber.title: Cyber Liability
cyber.desc: We secure damages caused by data breaches and cyber attacks.

liability.title: Professional Liability
liability.desc: Full protection against errors and omissions that may occur during your professional activities.

groupHealth.title: Group Health
groupHealth.desc: Protect the health and motivation of your employees with special advantageous packages.

engineering.title: Engineering
engineering.desc: Comprehensive assurance against technical risks such as construction, assembly, and machinery breakdown.

corporate.riskDesc: We don't just sell policies; we provide end-to-end risk analysis and management consultancy for your business.

healthTourism.title: Health Tourism Complication Insurance
healthTourism.description: We secure the complication risks that may occur after surgery for international patients and healthcare institutions.
healthTourism.heroDesc: For international patients and healthcare institutions coming to Turkey for treatment, we offer online complication insurance solutions through our innovative digital platform.
healthTourism.platformTitle: Assurance in Seconds with Our Digital Platform
healthTourism.platformDesc: Thanks to our advanced API integrations and user-friendly interface, healthcare institutions can instantly create policies for their patients.

approval.title: Fast Approval
approval.desc: Your policy number is ready in minutes.

coverage.title: Wide Coverage
coverage.desc: Reliable protection in all treatment branches.

clinics.title: Healthcare Institutions
clinics.desc: Corporate integration for hospitals and medical centers.

agencies.title: Agencies
agencies.desc: Bulk policy management for health tourism agencies.

individuals.title: Individual Patients
individuals.desc: International guests planning their own treatment.

online.title: Online Services
online.description: In this section, operations that customers can perform in the digital environment are listed. For example, getting an online quote, policy inquiry, claim notification, etc.

quote.title: Get Online Quote
quote.desc: You can get a free price quote for any insurance product you want in a few short steps through our website.

search.title: Policy and Claim Inquiry
search.desc: Would you like to view the details of your current policies or learn the status of a claim file?

logistics.title: Transport Insurance Online Login
logistics.desc: Our Transport Entry Portal, where you can issue transport insurance policies online for your cargo transportation business, is at your service.

health.title: Health Tourism Policy System
health.desc: If you want to issue complication insurance policies online for your patients within the scope of health tourism, please proceed to the "Issue Online Policy" section on our micro-site.

payment.title: Payment Conveniences
payment.desc: You can make secure payments by credit card in your online transactions. Have peace of mind thanks to our SSL security certified payment infrastructure.

quickSearch.title: Quick Policy Inquiry
quickSearch.note: * Your information is protected by SSL certificate.

howTo.title: How to Use?
howTo.desc: Guide documents and videos can also be found on the Online Transactions page.

guide.title: How to Use?
guide.description: Guides and video content we have prepared so that you can easily use our online transactions.
guide.expertHelp: Our expert team is happy to help you.

quote.title: Getting Online Quote
quote.step2: Fill out the contact form and select the insurance type
quote.step3: Our experts will send you the most suitable quote as soon as possible

search.title: Policy Inquiry
search.step1: Go to the Quick Policy Inquiry section
search.step2: Enter your ID or Tax Number
search.step3: Enter your Plate or Policy number
search.step4: Access your policy information by clicking the "Inquiry" button

logistics.title: Transport Portal Usage
logistics.step2: Log in with your corporate user information
logistics.step4: Create and download your policy instantly

health.title: Health Tourism Policy
health.step1: Go to the Health Tourism Platform
health.step3: Issue your complication insurance policy online

secure.a: Yes, all our online transactions are protected by 256-bit SSL certificate. Your personal information is transmitted encrypted.

payment.q: Which payment methods can I use?
payment.a: You can make secure payments by credit card and debit card. Please contact us for installment options.

download.q: How can I download my policy?
download.a: After making a policy inquiry, you can download the PDF version of your policy or request it to be sent to your e-mail address.

mobile.q: Can I perform transactions from mobile devices?
mobile.a: Yes, our website is compatible with all mobile devices. You can perform all online transactions from your smartphone or tablet.

footer.description: We provide individual and corporate insurance solutions with over 30 years of experience.
